grading_rationale: 3 P1 findings exceed the C threshold (max_p1=2). Grade D assigned per config.grading rules.
skip_reason: All services offline — dynamic mode unavailable

escalations.title: Handlebars.js JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion
escalations.context: Transitive dependency via jest/ts-jest. Not confirmed in production code paths.
escalations.recommendation: Audit whether Handlebars is reachable from production paths. Upgrade jest+ts-jest to pin handlebars >=4.7.9. Add npm audit --omit=dev gate to separate prod vs dev-only CVE exposure.

escalations.title: protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution via Malicious .proto Files
escalations.context: Production-path dependency via @opentelemetry packages loaded at server startup.
escalations.recommendation: Upgrade all @opentelemetry/* packages to versions bundling protobufjs >=7.5.5. Verify with `npm ls protobufjs`. Use overrides if no direct upgrade path.

backlog.title: Traceability Enforcer Blind to 87% of Codebase
backlog.detail: Enforcer hardcodes source_dirs=['Source','E2E'] and picks only one requirements.md. portal/ (1073 annotations), platform/, and 7 plan requirement files never scanned.
backlog.recommendation: Expand inspector.config.yml source.dirs to include portal/ and platform/. Update enforcer to iterate all Plans/*/requirements.md files.

backlog.title: AssessmentResult Domain Type Defined in Service Layer
backlog.detail: AssessmentResult exported from service file instead of Source/Shared/types/workflow.ts. Violates 'Shared types are single source of truth' rule.
backlog.recommendation: Move AssessmentResult to Source/Shared/types/workflow.ts and import in assessment.ts.

backlog.title: Duplicate Logger Abstraction — Shim + Real Implementation
backlog.detail: Two logger implementations in the same package produce inconsistent log formats. Routes can import either, violating 'use the project's logger abstraction' rule.
backlog.recommendation: Remove src/logger.ts shim. Update all imports to src/utils/logger.ts. Canonicalize the logger interface.

backlog.title: Silent JSON Parse Swallow in Frontend API Client
backlog.detail: catch(() => ({})) swallows JSON parse failures with no logging or comment. Violates 'never swallow errors silently' rule.
backlog.recommendation: Add intent comment or log in dev mode. Minimum: // Intentionally ignores parse errors — non-JSON error bodies fall back to status code message.

backlog.title: FR-TMP-008 Missing Verifies Comment in Dockerfile.worker
backlog.detail: Implementation correct (gh CLI + Playwright installed) but no # Verifies: FR-TMP-008 comment. All other FR-TMP requirements have comments.
backlog.recommendation: Add # Verifies: FR-TMP-008 — Worker container: gh CLI and Playwright prerequisites above the install blocks.

backlog.title: path-to-regexp ReDoS via Multiple Route Parameters
backlog.detail: path-to-regexp <0.1.13 vulnerable to ReDoS. Pulled via express in orchestrator and portal/Backend.
backlog.recommendation: npm update express in platform/orchestrator and portal/Backend. v4.19.0+ includes fixed path-to-regexp.

backlog.title: picomatch ReDoS + Method Injection via Extglob
backlog.detail: picomatch <2.3.2 and >=4.0.0 <4.0.4 vulnerable. Pulled via tailwindcss. Dev-time build tool impact.
backlog.recommendation: Upgrade tailwindcss in portal/Frontend to a version pinning picomatch >=2.3.2 or >=4.0.4.

backlog.title: ESLint exhaustive-deps Suppressions Without Explanation
backlog.detail: Two eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps without comments explaining which dep is intentionally omitted and why.
backlog.recommendation: Add explanation comment to each suppression identifying the intentionally omitted dependency and the reason.

backlog.title: 40+ Test Cases Lack Verifies Annotations
backlog.detail: dependency.test.ts: 22 untraced; workItems.test.ts: 7; workItemStore.test.ts: 6; plus 5 more across 3 files.
backlog.recommendation: Add // Verifies: FR-XXX to untraced tests. Start with dependency.test.ts (largest gap).

backlog.title: DebugPortalPage.tsx Has No Test File
backlog.detail: Page contains URL routing and iframe src construction logic with no test coverage.
backlog.recommendation: Add Source/Frontend/tests/DebugPortalPage.test.tsx with smoke render test and iframe src URL verification.

backlog.title: Frontend Hooks and Badge Components Have No Tests
backlog.detail: 6 files with no test coverage. useWorkItems.ts is 118 lines with complex error-handling branches.
backlog.recommendation: Add unit tests for hooks (mock api/client.ts) and snapshot tests for badge components. FR-WF-010/011 integration tests are not sufficient substitutes.

backlog.title: Vite Dev Server Path Traversal via Source Map Handling
backlog.detail: Vite <=6.4.1 path traversal in source map handling. Dev-time only. No production impact.
backlog.recommendation: Upgrade Vite to latest (8.0.8+ resolves this, requires major version coordination).

backlog.title: esbuild Dev Server CORS Bypass
backlog.detail: esbuild <=0.24.2 dev server allows any website to send requests. Dev-time only.
backlog.recommendation: Upgrade Vite (bundles esbuild). Resolved by same Vite major upgrade as DEP-005.

backlog.title: brace-expansion Memory Exhaustion via Zero-Step Sequence
backlog.detail: brace-expansion <1.1.13 causes memory exhaustion via crafted pattern. Pulled via ts-jest/jest.
backlog.recommendation: Update ts-jest and jest to versions pinning brace-expansion >=1.1.13.

backlog.title: workflow-engine.md Has No FR-XXX Identifiers
backlog.detail: Domain spec contains requirements but no FR-XXX IDs. Two-hop traceability chain via plan file.
backlog.recommendation: Annotate spec sections with FR-WF-* references, or document the plan file as the FR ID source in the spec header.

backlog.title: api-contracts.md May Diverge From TypeScript Types
backlog.detail: Markdown type definitions have no enforced consistency with Source/Shared/types/workflow.ts.
backlog.recommendation: Remove api-contracts.md (use TypeScript as canonical) or add CI check verifying field names match.

backlog.title: portal/Backend Has 577 Transitive Dependencies
backlog.detail: 577 total dependencies (397 prod, 181 dev). Large attack surface driven primarily by @opentelemetry auto-instrumentations.
backlog.recommendation: Audit and remove unused OpenTelemetry auto-instrumentation plugins. Target: reduce prod deps by 20%+.
